nasb.text: They seized upon that statement, discussing with one another what rising from the dead meant.

esv.text: So they kept the matter to themselves, questioning what this rising from the dead might mean.

cnv.text: 門徒把這句話記在心裡，又彼此討論從死人中復活是甚麼意思。

ccb.text: 门徒把这话谨记在心，彼此议论“从死里复活”这句话的意思。

csbs.text: 他们牢记这话，互相谈论“从死人中复活”是什么意思。
